params.name: Golden Toad Mallet
params.source: Unlocked after ringing the Sky City bell in Parsia.
params.description: Blessed by Earth’s Will, the first transmigrated toad ascended into a Golden Toad, mastering the Truth of Capital— one of the Three Thousand Great Principles! This mallet, its soul-bound artifact, grants dominion over the path of wealth.
params.ss1:
Parsian Exploration, DMG to Enemies +1%
Parsian Exploration, Black Tadpoles +1%
